2026-03-11 Today I got the Neocities CLI running on my machine. This will, in theory, let me update my site without having to manually upload all my files from my computer. I'm still not really sure how a static site generator works, or whether I'm supposed to upload everything. It's currently uploading all the Node modules? Am I supposed to do that? Wow, even an empty Astro site has a lot of files, huh? I also still haven't... built the website yet. I'm learning as I go, but I want to have a way to log things and show my results while I learn. So the site is more or less the empty Astro site right now, with a "hello world" text. My _hope_ is that the site will finish uploading and Just Work(TM). And if it does, I can then proceed with the Astro blog tutorial. This method won't link my site inextricably to Github, since I can push direct to Neocities via the CLI. I could switch to Codeberg or something with minimal disruption, which is valuable to me.
